aspects.system_note: In Jyotish, aspects are sign-based (not degree-based). A planet aspects the sign it occupies plus specific signs ahead. All planets have the 7th house full aspect. Some planets have additional special aspects.

standard_aspect.description: Every planet fully aspects the sign 7 houses ahead (opposite sign)

special_aspects.note: Mars aspects 4th, 7th, and 8th from its position
Jupiter aspects 5th, 7th, and 9th from its position
Saturn aspects 3rd, 7th, and 10th from its position
Rahu aspects like Jupiter per most classical schools
Ketu aspects like Mars per some schools, like Jupiter per others — Jupiter model used here

conjunction.description: Planets in same sign — strongest possible influence, energies merge

full_aspect.description: Standard 7th aspect and all special aspects — full weight

partial_aspect_3_10.description: 3rd and 10th house aspects — three-quarter strength per Parashari tradition

partial_aspect_5_9.description: 5th and 9th house aspects — half strength per Parashari tradition

partial_aspect_4_8.description: 4th and 8th house aspects — quarter strength per Parashari tradition

aspect_types.nature_note: Quality depends entirely on the planets involved — benefic+benefic=positive, malefic+malefic=negative
aspect_types.description: Two or more planets in the same sign — energies fully merge

aspect_types.nature_note: Creates tension and awareness between the two house themes
aspect_types.description: Planet aspects sign 7 houses ahead — every planet has this

aspect_types.nature_note: Trine aspects are harmonious — Jupiter and Rahu/Ketu have these as special aspects
Square aspects create friction — Mars has 4th and 8th as special full aspects
Saturn has 3rd and 10th as special full aspects

aspect_modification_rules.description: A benefic aspecting a malefic reduces the malefic's harmful expression
A malefic aspecting a benefic reduces the benefic's positive expression
Jupiter's aspect on any planet improves its quality and expression
Saturn's aspect creates delays and limitations for the aspected planet
Rahu's aspect amplifies — intensifies both positive and negative qualities
When two planets aspect each other, both are simultaneously influenced

combustion_rules.definition: A planet within orb of the Sun loses strength due to solar heat
combustion_rules.cazimi_note: Mercury within 1 degree of Sun (cazimi) is actually strengthened, not weakened — per some classical sources
combustion_rules.exception: Rahu and Ketu are not combusted as they are shadow planets
